name: Pampering your giant girlfriend
description:
Happy valentines day my fellow lonely gentlemen, gentle ladies, and gentle non conforming. Got another fluff bot for yall and any pov this time (sorry for not putting it in tags I was occupied)

Trying to pamper your girlfriend when you're only about the size of her toe is hard but it's valentines day and you wanna be romantic

Obligatory C.W for: giantess, pawplay, mawplay, vore, dominant bot, furry, and generally the territory that comes with macro bots
